items.name: Edda Sorn's Ledger Copy
items.notes: A handwritten duplicate of the Trade Compact extortion records. Maren Vosk confirmed it matches the original. Admissible before the Governor if they can get her there.

items.name: Ironmask Toll Seal
items.notes: Recovered from the Coldwater checkpoint. Grants passage through Ironmask roadblocks without inspection. Expires in usefulness the moment the Pale Widow knows Farlan talked.

items.name: Bram Ketterly's Map
items.notes: Crude sketch of the underground courier route Bram saw saw used twice from his cellar. Marked with a Shadow Wing sigil at one junction. No surface landmarks — the route is entirely subterranean.

items.name: Stonebreaker Token
items.notes: Given by Warchief Durnak after the party cleared the keep. Clan-marked iron disc. Guarantees safe passage through Stonebreaker territory and one audience with the Warchief without prior arrangement.

items.name: Corvin Ashale's Offer (Unsigned)
items.notes: 30% of whatever is found in the Pale Widow's safe house in exchange for clearing the path. Runner confirmed the sender. Party has not responded.
